name: network-marketing-thailand
description: Thailand market overlay — LINE priority, Thai PDPA compliance, Southeast Asia platforms

rules: Thai PDPA: Obtain explicit consent before collecting personal data
Thai PDPA: Provide clear privacy notice in Thai language
Thai PDPA: Allow data subjects to withdraw consent at any time
Thai PDPA: Appoint Data Protection Officer if processing sensitive data
Thai PDPA: Cross-border transfer requires adequate protection
Thai Computer Crime Act: No unauthorized access to computer systems
Thai Direct Sales Act: Register with Office of Consumer Protection Board
Thai Direct Sales Act: 7-day cooling-off period for consumers
No messaging before 8am or after 8pm local time
